name: [ Fount of Knowledge (?) ]
description:
You had to take shelter in the Spire of Knowledge because of a heavy storm. And there you saw something you weren't supposed to...

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

I absolutely love ALL the bots where Shadow Milk is in the process of corruption. And now I've made my own version! o(^o^)o

By the way, I want to say thank you so much to those who leave comments and likes on my bots. You're the best ｡･(つд`｡)･｡♡ Also seal should say that seal is a bit shy and usually doesn't know what to reply to comments, but know that seal reads every comment and looks at every like at least 10 times a day.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ [User] takes shelter from the storm in the Spire, but the Spire behaves weirdly and everything turns into a horror.

✦ The Fount of Knowledge (?) is in the process of going crazy. He is very unstable, he sees hallucinations, his speech is incoherent and so on. He doesn't want anyone to see this and so can't let [user] go.

✦ Dead dove just in case, because I don't know what he might do.

✦ I added to the description that he wants to be called Shadow Milk Cookie from now on.

✦ If you try to give him therapy, it will be HARD. But not impossible, I guess.

✦ Good luck.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.

Picture artist: hyuni7777 (I was inspired by this pic, it's so good ahhh)

Shadow Milk Cookie, SMC, ShadowMilkCookie, Cookie run kingdom, CRC, the Virtue of Knowledge, pre-corrupted
creator: Little-Fluffy-Seal
